Capabilities Work Articles About GitHub

Current work

Things I am building and thinking through.

This page is intentionally organized around capability and current direction rather than job history.

Forecasting and decision-support platforms

Building systems that move from raw operational data through normalized analytical layers, model execution, evaluation, APIs, and dashboards for decision-oriented domains such as demand planning, inventory health, pricing, and energy markets.

AI-assisted development orchestration

Designing autonomous software development systems that route work across AI coding backends, preserve scope through structured task contracts, verify changes deterministically, and handle failure through explicit retry and escalation paths.

Data platform modernization

Converting fdocument intelligencemented or legacy data workflows into scalable, maintainable platforms using cloud-native services, columnar data formats, reproducible pipelines, and production serving layers.

Document intelligence systems

Developing document intelligence systems that combine LLMs, embeddings, vector stores, and structured search to support code generation, research agents, operational assistants, and document-heavy business workflows.
